decisions.summary: Common judgment spine reviewed for issue #227 PR body limit guard: current reality is a GitHub 65,536 character PR body limit that can reject oversized VibePro generated bodies, failure modes are over-limit gh pr create/edit failure and silent loss of audit context, and done evidence is current full CLI regression plus typecheck bound to c7b18589.
decisions.reason: current_reality, failure_modes, and done_evidence are explicitly documented in story/spec/architecture and verified by strict-head evidence records; no remaining source change is needed for this gate.
